title: Automatically populate dates for tasks by linking to a Milestone Date
excerpt: I need help to link task due dates to a Date (eg: if we deliver a workshop on 31/03/25 then I want my tasks pre/post that to have a date automatically populated by setting number of days pre/post)

posts.author: MichelleF (Michelle Fairless)
posts.cookedHtml: I need help to link task due dates to a Date (eg: if we deliver a workshop on 31/03/25 then I want my tasks pre/post that to have a date automatically populated by setting number of days pre/post)

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MichelleF how is your board set up? Is it an item with the tasks as sub items?
